title: フェブラリーSの後に・はじめて

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew! I ran sooo fast!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That was a blast! So this is what "gee one" races
are like, huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Did you see who was in the stands?
My shopkeeper friends came to watch!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I was waving at them. Do you think they saw?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, before she came back, I did
see a group in the stands waving their hands
vigorously.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You think they'll come to my next race, too?
Which one am I doing next?
choice_data_list: You don't have one in mind?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? As long as I can run, I'll do any of them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's just like her to say. I'd rather she have a
specific race she wants to shoot for, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, if she wants to enter the Arima Kinen,
then there's only so many races to choose from.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she wants to run in the Arima Kinen, she needs
to get used to races that are longer than a mile.
To that effect, the race I have in mind is only a
hundred meters longer than this one, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell my shopkeeper friends I'm entering the Elm
Stakes then!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What?! That far?! I guess there's no way they
could come, then.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee. But if I do good in it, then I can go somewhere they can come watch me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okey-dokey! Time to prepare for my concert!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara goes back to the waiting room, and I
head backstage.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! There's so many people! Way more than
usual!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I wi―huh?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's gaze lands on an Umamusume with
an unhappy face. She ran in today's race, too.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: U-Urara... Yeah, I'm fine, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But you look so sad! The concert's about to start.
You're not happy?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Look, so many people came out to watch us!
Where's that smile you always have?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: How can I smile right now?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I finally got into a G1 race... I finally had a
chance! But I blew it!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I wanted to win! But I didn't even make it to the center stage! I'm a loser!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
How can I smile at a time like this? I'm so, so
angry! I can't smile!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Angry?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry, forget it. I'm fine. I'll put on a happy face
for the show.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Next time, I will be center stage!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...She left.
choice_data_list: Is she a friend of yours?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. She's smiling all the time. She's super nice
to everybody, too...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I've never seen her like this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara seems shocked. Seeing a new side of
her friend like this must've really impacted her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Okay, I gotta give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara regains her composure and heads
toward the stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the second half of the show, I join the
audience and see that Special Week has come to
watch.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah! Urara's trainer! Hello!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Urara looks like she's having so much fun dancing!
Just watching her gets me excited, too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's why I love coming to see her concerts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like Special Week says, Haru Urara's charm is
in how much energy she exudes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why everyone loves her. No matter how
many times she fails, she's always smiling.

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Urara always tries so hard.

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
I want to see her smiling on the Arima Kinen stage
too. I hope she qualifies...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I overhear a familiar voice. Looking over, I see
the shopkeepers from the shopping district
talking while watching the performance.

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
But can she even enter the Arima Kinen at this
rate? Her results aren't great...

text_block_list.name: Happy Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: I wonder if there's anything we can do to help...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, the show's almost over, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When you go back, please tell Urara I said the
show was fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head back to the waiting room with the
shopkeepers' conversation still fresh in my mind.
